race.description: Hawaii Five Oh @ Vinery Stud Handicap
race.comment: CAP SAINT MARTIN (3) returned in encouraging fashion over 1600m at Warwick Farm a fortnight ago, settling back before hitting the line strongly for third. He can find a spot closer to the lead from the pole position this time, and the extra 200m will suit him. Hard to beat. GLAD YOU THINK SO (2) has needed both of his runs back from a spell, including his sixth over 2000m at Randwick 25 days ago in a tougher field. He has a superior gate this time, and with a 3kg claim to offset his weight rise, he can figure in the top 3. GENTILESCHI (8) has been well supported in recent starts without delivering her best, finishing sixth over 2110m at Warwick Farm last time out, 3 weeks ago. She is far better than that and is worth another chance. WITHOUT PEER (9) resumed with a solid fifth over 1400m at Warwick Farm 3 weeks ago, when beaten by only 2 lengths. He was good enough to be G3 placed in the spring, and he can improve quickly second up. Each-way. KAAZI (10) has top 4 claims again.
